violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on prep unit #1 and the salad refrigerator. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2026

Employee(s) certified in food safety was not present during the time of inspection. Employee(s) certified in food safety must be present at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
Various hand-washing sinks in the kitchen were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
